chapter: Indications for Non-organ-specific Whole Body Imaging

differentials.name: Lymphoma a:   Hodgkin disease: 74-88% sensitivity b:   NHL: sensitivity varies ›  histiocytic form: 85-90% sensitivity ›  lymphocytic well-diff.: 55-70% sensitivity 95% sensitivity for mediastinal disease, 80% sensitivity for cervical + superficial lesions; poor sensitivity below diaphragm
differentials.raw: Lymphoma a:   Hodgkin disease: 74-88% sensitivity b:   NHL: sensitivity varies ›  histiocytic form: 85-90% sensitivity ›  lymphocytic well-diff.: 55-70% sensitivity 95% sensitivity for mediastinal disease, 80% sensitivity for cervical + superficial lesions; poor sensitivity below diaphragm

context: Particularly useful in evaluating extent of known tumor disease + in detection of tumor recurrence
